case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. DYMOND CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL AS TO RESPONDENT DYMOND CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. DOES 1 THROUGH 10,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

POS RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; NOTICE OF HEARING, MEMORANDUM OF P/A; DECLARATION OF KRISTINA ZINNEN, INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES. FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-21-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DYMOND CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. $38,604.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $455.00 COSTS, $300.00 COST OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDING, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,359.50, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUTBOX)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERERNCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DYMOND CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. $80,642.03 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80,642.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
